steps.title: Use the prism volume formula
steps.content:
For a right square prism with base edge length $s$, the square base has area $s^2$. Substitute the given volume and height.
$$1{,}815=s^2(15)$$

steps.title: Solve for the edge
steps.content: Divide by $15$ and take the positive square root. $$s^2=\frac{1{,}815}{15}=121$$ $$s=\sqrt{121}=11$$ The answer is 11.
